name: Ali ibn Aqeel
title: Hero of Aqeel
shortDescription: One of the brave sons of Aqeel ibn Abi Talib who struck the heart of the enemy with epic poetry on Ashura and was martyred.
fullStory:
Ali ibn Aqeel was one of the heroes of the Bani Hashem family and the brother of Muslim ibn Aqeel. The family of Aqeel showed unparalleled sacrifices on the day of Ashura and offered several martyrs in the path of Imam Hussain (AS).

Carrying the grief of his brother Muslim and other dear ones in his chest, Ali ibn Aqeel entered the battlefield with the permission of Imam Hussain (AS). He bravely recited war poetry, introducing himself so the enemies would know which family they were facing.

In his poems, he said: 'I am Ali ibn Aqeel, from a pure and noble family. I strike with my sword to help my brother Hussain, who is the best of guides.'

Ali ibn Aqeel skillfully attacked the enemy lines and, after killing a number of Kufans, was attacked by a person named Abdullah ibn Qutba and attained the great honor of martyrdom.
quoteArabic: أَنا عَلِيُّ بْنُ عَقِيلِ بْنِ أَبِي طالِبٍ... أَضْرِبُكُمْ بِالسَّيْفِ حَتّى يَثْنَى...
quote: (In his war poetry:) I am Ali ibn Aqeel... I will strike you with my sword until it bends, to defend Hussain...
